narrative:
Green Twp township has 3,471 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.0 percentage points.
